Outcome can be existentially significant: friendly superintelligence can help us solve most of our problem, while unfriendly one can pose existential risk. Development of superintelligence may be most important event in human history, and it can happen soon. But we don't know exactly when or how this will occur. Some expert believe that once machine reach human-level intelligence, it will quick improve itself and become so much more intelligent. Other think that maybe got obstacle that slow down this process. No matter how the thing happen, consequence for humanity can be profound. We must prepare for possibility that superintelligence will arrive, and we must do our best for to guide its development in direction that benefit all. 1. Cuci tangki air tu setiap enam bulan sekali dengan sabun dan berus lembut.
